description: Get a list of incidents: netwitness-get-incidents
examples:
Command Example
!NetWitness -get-incident incidentId="INC-1"
Context Example
{
"
NetWitness
"
: {
name: netwitness-get-incident

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the incident. NetWitness.Incidents.title Title of the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.id

outputs.description: Summary of the incident. NetWitness.Incidents.priority The incident priority.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.summary

outputs.description: Incident risk score calculated based on associated alert’s risk score. Risk score ranges from 0 (no risk) to 100 (highest risk). NetWitness.Incidents.status The current status.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.riskScore

outputs.description: Number of alerts associated with the Incident. NetWitness.Incidents.averageAlertRiskScore Average risk score of the alerts associated with the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.alertCount

outputs.description: Indicates if additional alerts can be associated with an incident. NetWitness.Incidents.totalRemediationTaskCount The number of total remediation tasks for the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.sealed

outputs.description: The number of open remediation tasks for the incident. NetWitness.Incidents.created The timestamp of when the incident is created.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.openRemediationTaskCount

outputs.description: The timestamp of when the incident was last updated. NetWitness.Incidents.lastUpdatedBy The NetWitness user identifier of the user who last updated the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.lastUpdated

outputs.description: The NetWitness user identifier of the user currently working on the incident. NetWitness.Incidents.sources Unique set of sources for all of the Alerts in the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.assignee

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the rule that created the incident. NetWitness.Incidents.firstAlertTime The timestamp of the earliest occurring Alert in this incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.ruleId

outputs.description: The unique category identifier. NetWitness.Incidents.categories.parent Parent name of the category.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.categories.id

outputs.description: Friendly name of the category. NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.id The unique journal entry identifier.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.categories.name

outputs.description: The author of this entry. NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.notes Notes and observations about the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.author

outputs.description: The timestamp of the journal entry created date. NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.lastUpdated The timestamp of the journal entry last updated date.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.created

outputs.description: Incident milestone classifier. NetWitness.Incidents.createdBy The NetWitness user id or name of the rule that created the incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.journalEntries.milestone

outputs.description: The number of alerts that are deleted from theincident. NetWitness.Incidents.eventCount Number of events associated with incident.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.deletedAlertCount

outputs.description: Unique source IP addresses. NetWitness.Incidents.alertMeta.DestinationIp Unique destination IP addresses.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Incidents.alertMeta.SourceIp

outputs.description: The unique alert identifier. NetWitness.Alerts.incidentId The incident id associated with the alert.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.id

outputs.description: The title or name of the rule that created the alert. NetWitness.Alerts.detail The details of the alert. This can be the module name or meta that the module included.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.title

outputs.description: The timestamp of the alert created date. NetWitness.Alerts.source The source of this alert. For example, "Event Stream Analysis", "Malware Analysis", etc.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.created

outputs.description: The risk score of this alert, usually in the range 0 - 100. NetWitness.Alerts.type Type of alert, "Network", "Log", etc.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.riskScore

outputs.description: The IP address. NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.port The port.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.ipAddress

outputs.description: The ethernet MAC address. NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.dnsHostname The DNS resolved hostname.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.macAddress

outputs.description: The top-level domain from the DNS resolved hostname NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.username The unique username.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.device.dnsDomain

outputs.description: An email address. NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.adUsername An Active Directory (AD) username.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.emailAddress

outputs.description: An Active Directory (AD) domain NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.ipAddress The IP address.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.source.user.adDomain

outputs.description: The port. NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.macAddress The ethernet MAC address.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.port

outputs.description: The DNS resolved hostname. NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.dnsDomain The top-level domain from the DNS resolved hostname
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.device.dnsHostname

outputs.description: The unique username. NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.emailAddress An email address.
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.username

outputs.description: An Active Directory (AD) username. NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.adDomain An Active Directory (AD) domain
outputs.name: NetWitness.Alerts.events.destination.user.adUsername
